description: Fix trellis update skipping unregistered scripts, merge v0.3.10 fixes
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(update): use getAllScripts() as single source of truth — 11 Python scripts were silently skipped by `trellis update` because they weren't registered in the manual file list

**Merged from v0.3.10:**
- fix(init): accept HTTPS URLs for --registry option (#87)
- fix(templates): clarify record-session commit rule for AI model compatibility (#88)
notes: Run `trellis update` to sync all Python scripts that may have been missed in previous updates.
